allow: Bash(ADMIN_PASSWORD=testadmin EXPORT_PASSWORD=testexport SESSION_SECRET=abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890 DB_PATH=/tmp/test-challenge.db timeout 5 node server.js)

Bash(echo "no sqlite flag" node -e "process.emitWarning = \(msg, ...args\) => { if \(String\(msg\).includes\(''''SQLite''''\)\) return; process.stdout.write\(''''warn: ''''+msg+''''\\n''''\); }; require\(''''node:sqlite''''\)")
